query: SELECT id, code, name, value, unit, category FROM pricing_config WHERE code IN ('MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML', 'MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML', 'COCINA_ML_L', 'COCINA_ML_U', 'COCINA_ML_LINEAL') ORDER BY code;
